reachability_artifacts: built sworn serve mobile browser journey at 360 by 800 CSS pixels with the current release, active loop, blocker, event, and notification health visible
360-pixel browser screenshot retained under the slice proof assets and reviewed for overflow, hierarchy, readable states, focus, and touch targets
browser accessibility and network capture proving semantic state, keyboard traversal, preserved focus during SSE, same-origin GET-only traffic, and visible degraded state

effort_complexity.rationale: See spec.json; implementer must re-evaluate visual architecture and browser harness feasibility before design review.

release_benefit: A SwornAgent operator can trust a recoverable autonomous release loop, receive durable attention pages, and monitor or safely control it from a mobile web board.

positive_scenarios: A phone user sees the active loop, most urgent blocker, and delivery health at 360 pixels without scrolling sideways.
A keyboard and screen-reader user can navigate the board and receive concise live updates.
A disconnected or malformed source is visibly degraded rather than presented as no work.
negative_scenarios: The read-only board exposes no command control and sends no mutation request.
Malicious event text is inert and causes no third-party request.
SSE rerenders do not steal focus or collapse an operator's open details.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: A mobile-first summary of authoritative loop state restores the practical ability to supervise autonomous work away from a terminal.

design_decisions.choice: Embed a dependency-free HTML, CSS, and JavaScript board in the Go binary.
design_decisions.rationale: It preserves distribution and offline-local operation while allowing direct use of C-06 in ordinary mobile browsers.

design_decisions.choice: Ship summary-first read-only monitoring before any remote operation control.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified 2026-07-14 (D4): ship summary-first read-only mobile monitoring before enabling remote mutation controls.
design_decisions.rationale: It delivers the priority mobile value while the authorization, conflict, and audit boundary receives independent verification in S11.

design_decisions.choice: Use a real-browser gate and reviewed 360-pixel screenshot as mandatory reachability evidence.
design_decisions.rationale: Responsive overflow, computed focus/contrast, and dynamic accessibility behavior do not exist at handler-test level.
